---
title: "My First Data Science Post"
date: 2025-03-05
description: "A short summary that appears on the blog listing page — keep it to 1-2 sentences."
image: assets/your-data-viz.png
categories: [python, data]
---

## Introduction

Your written content goes here.

## Python Analysis
```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

x = np.linspace(0, 10, 100)
plt.plot(x, np.sin(x))
plt.title("My First Plot")
plt.show()
```

## Findings

More written content and analysis here.
